reagents.grade_purity: lanarkite, pre-synthesised from PbO + PbSO4 (725 C, 24 h, air) per Lee/Kim 2023 §2.1
copper phosphide, pre-synthesised from Cu + P (550 C, 48 h, vacuum sealed tube) per Lee/Kim 2023 §2.2

provenance.source_citation: Lee, S.; Kim, J.-H.; Kwon, Y.-W. (2023). 'The First Room-Temperature Ambient-Pressure Superconductor.' arXiv:2307.12008. Companion: Lee, S.; Kim, J.-H.; Im, H.-T.; An, S.-M.; Auh, K.-H. (2023). 'Superconductor Pb10-xCux(PO4)6O showing levitation at room temperature and atmospheric pressure and mechanism.' arXiv:2307.12037.

scope_caveats: Original arXiv preprint (2307.12008, Lee/Kim 2023). Multiple independent attempts (Nature Sept 2023 synthesis efforts: Beijing, USTC, Princeton, Berkeley, IISc Bangalore, Max Planck) failed to reproduce Tc>300K. The synthesized material may be reproducible as a material (apatite-structure Pb10-xCux(PO4)6O can be made), but its claimed room-temperature superconductivity property is NOT replicated.
Solid-state reaction parameters (925 C, 5 h, vacuum sealed quartz tube) follow Lee/Kim 2023 §2.3 verbatim. Reported duration varies in companion paper (5-20 h); the canonical figure here is 5 h.
Stoichiometry (1:1 molar lanarkite : Cu3P) targets x≈1 substitution per the paper's mechanism claim. The Cu site occupancy is itself contested in follow-up DFT work.
RTSC.md §8.8: LK-99 family never reaches absorbed=true. Tier 2 ingest is recipe + citation only; Tier 3 measurement and Tier 4 falsifier remain ✗ for this family.

(annotation added 2026-05-22 — honest-scrub pass) Empirical resolution of the original signal: independent analyses (Jain arxiv:2308.05222 · Zhu et al arxiv:2308.07999) attribute the sharp resistivity drop near 385 K and the ferromagnetic levitation to a Cu2S impurity β→α first-order phase transition (~385 K), NOT bulk superconductivity. This recipe is preserved as the canonical honest-negative anchor for F-RTSC-3 (replicated_by_independent_labs=0); the substrate behaviour and R4 invariant are unchanged.
citations: arxiv:2308.07999 (Zhu et al 2023 — independent Cu2S impurity confirmation)
RTSC.md §8.8 (g3 honest stance — RTSC class never absorbed)
